problem: Healthcare providers and service businesses need online booking and appointment management with client self-scheduling, automated reminders, and HIPAA-compliant features.
solution: Acuity Scheduling (Squarespace) provides online appointment scheduling software with client self-booking, automated reminders, intake forms, payment processing, and HIPAA-compliant features on Premium plans. The platform supports multiple locations, calendar syncing, and integrations with video conferencing and marketing tools.
